steps.title: Use the table intersection
steps.content: This is a direct table lookup, not a calculation. First find the row for air temperature $26^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Read the matching column
steps.content: Move across that row to the column for wind speed $15$ mph. The table entry at this row-column intersection is $14^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The instructions say to disregard the degree symbol when entering the answer, so enter 14.
